qualifier: Three opens, tape softening, no fresh entries

paragraphs:
Tape softened through the session.
Breadth crashed 13/20 → 6/20 green intraday as Iran talks stalled and ETH narrative fractured.
Bankless co-host capitulated, EF talent exodus accelerated, capital rotating to Solana and Hyperliquid.
F&G 28 Fear, unchanged.
Risk-off without a panic flush.

BTC funding +0.0065%/8h, OI +0.78% 24h.
Leverage muted on the majors.
PROVE flushed into CAPITULATION on -11% 24h against +500% 7d OI build.
Smart money cleared before the wick.
BEAT cleared every CATALYST-BREAKOUT gate but the taker buy (0.81pp short) on a +50% 24h rip with retail piling into OI.
NEAR, ONDO, CL all rolled out of yesterday's ACCUMULATION as range gates broke past 25%.

DeFi infra cluster broadened: Polymarket exploit, MegaETH Terminal shutdown, Pyth reliability concerns all printing in one window.
Iran oscillated three frames in one day.
Equities priced a deal, energy markets priced Hormuz closure.
Warsh vanished from crypto-side coverage inside one hour.
The bullish-BTC framing recycled to TradFi 'higher for longer.'
market_sentiment.bias_line: Stance: hold the three longs with trails tight. No fresh entries on a softening tape with the ledger already heavy.

current_positions.thesis_note: Rip already booked but invalidation 9.5% away, AI/DePIN both still PEAK
current_positions.watch: first red day with OI dropping — +151% 7d OI is the asymmetric risk

current_positions.thesis_note: Smart money +0.15 7d still bid, ETF flow holding
current_positions.invalidation: close below $56, OR clean break below the post-June-6-unlock settlement low
current_positions.watch: narrative-tracker FADE day 3 active — a top L/S 7d delta flip is the structural break

current_positions.thesis_note: RWA PEAK still RIDE w/ trail, range break held above $0.45
current_positions.watch: trending-list drop or close below $0.43 — trail tight

watchlist.trigger: top L/S turns up through 1.10 OR funding holds negative on another vol-multiple day with pct_24h past +10%
watchlist.thesis: Vol 12.89x today with short-liq cascade 11x p75. Funding -0.003%/8h on rising price reads short pile-in. DePIN 5/5 PEAK + token-call HIGH 10/10 cross-confirm. Top L/S 1.06 down 0.25 7d means retail-led, not smart-money confirmed.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clean through 52% with OI continuing to build OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $275 OR funding flips negative
watchlist.thesis: Only ACCUMULATION print in today's universe. OI +10.85% 7d on a tight 15.87% range. Funding +0.008%/8h above 7d avg. AI compute 5/5 PEAK · RIDE. DIVERGENT sub-tag reads passive build, possibly arb.

watchlist.trigger: OI flips negative on a red day (oi_24h_pct < 0 with pct_24h < 0) — fires CAPITULATION per perps-scan
watchlist.thesis: Parabolic. +299.97% 7d, OI +1183% 7d while top L/S collapsed -0.57 7d. Funding flipped positive off a -0.0246% base. Pct_4h -13.23% inside today already starting to crack the structure.

watchlist.trigger: close below $620 OR top L/S falls under 0.75
watchlist.thesis: Privacy/ZK FADING — mindshare 2/5, narrative-tracker FADE confirmed. Third down day from the $667.93 peak. Top L/S 0.81 net short, -0.13 7d. -4.62% 24h on OI -5.88% reads forced long unwind, not fresh short stack.

evaluations.note: Day 1 evening eval. Rip booked at fire, -2.58% intraday slippage, invalidation 9.5% away. Watching the +151% 7d OI stack for flush risk.
Day 1 evening eval. -1.77% from fire, well above $56 invalidation. Narrative-tracker FADE day 3 active — watching top L/S delta for structural break.
Day 1 evening eval. -1.84% from fire, range break above $0.45 held. RWA PEAK saturation risk keeps trail tight.
